message:
feat(mux): implement swap layouts with stacked panes [ft-2dd4s.3]

Port Zellij-style swap layout system: users can cycle through pre-defined
pane arrangements (grid-4, main-side, stacked, main-bottom) preserving
all panes. Overflow panes are stacked with tab-like cycling.

New layout.rs: SwapLayout, LayoutArrangement, PaneStack, LayoutCycle,
redistribute_panes algorithm. Tab gains set_layout_cycle, swap_to_next/
prev_layout, cycle_stack, and related APIs.

8 unit tests + 2 proptests (no-pane-loss, focus-always-valid) + 11 layout
module tests = 21 new tests total. All 223 mux tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
